common.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

home.title: Time2Gather
home.description: It only takes 5 seconds to make plans now. Share your time slots, get votes, and instantly see the best time for everyone!
home.heroSubtitle: Say goodbye to complicated scheduling. Find the perfect time with your friends.

landing.eyebrow: Coordinate everyone’s schedule in one place
landing.title: Make meeting scheduling simpler
landing.description: Time2Gather is a free scheduling service for voting on dates, times, and locations to find a meeting time that works for everyone.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need to coordinate a meeting

dates.title: Compare multiple dates
dates.description: Choose candidate dates and share them with your participants right away.

times.title: Vote on available times
times.description: Collect detailed availability to find the time that works for the most people.

locations.title: Decide on a location too
locations.description: Add location options when your group needs to choose where to meet.

sharing.title: Join from one link
sharing.description: Share a link so participants can vote quickly, with sign-in or anonymously.

create.title: 1. Create options
create.description: Set a meeting title and the dates or times to compare.

share.title: 2. Share the link
share.description: Send the link to friends, teammates, or your group.

decide.title: 3. Confirm the result
decide.description: Review the votes and choose the best time for everyone.

what.question: What is Time2Gather?
what.answer: It is a scheduling service that collects date and time availability from a group through voting.

login.question: Do participants need to sign in?
login.answer: When the meeting owner allows anonymous participation, people can vote with a nickname and password instead.

location.question: Can we vote on locations?
location.answer: Yes. Turn on location voting while creating a meeting to let participants choose from location options.

login.title: Ready to schedule?
login.description: Sign in to create and manage your meetings.

search.title: Find a meeting
search.description: Enter the meeting code you received.

descriptionStep.heading: What kind of meeting is this?

locationStep.heading: Add location voting?
locationStep.enableLocationVote: Let participants vote on a location
locationStep.enableLocationVoteDescription: Add at least two options for participants to choose from.
locationStep.minLocationsWarning: At least 2 locations are required for location voting
locationStep.maxLocationsWarning: You can only add up to 5 locations

notFound.title: Meeting Not Found
notFound.description: The meeting you requested does not exist or has been deleted.

meeting.selectedDates: Choose the dates that work for you from {count} options.
meeting.selectedDatesAndTimes: Choose the dates and times that work for you from {count} date options.

timeGrid.touchHint: Press, hold, then drag to select multiple times
timeGrid.pointerHint: Drag to select multiple times at once
timeGrid.draggingHint: Dragging · Release to apply your selection

meeting.cancelConfirmError: Failed to cancel confirmation. Please try again.
meeting.alreadyConfirmedError: This meeting is already confirmed. You cannot modify your vote.

exportDialog.title: Add to Calendar
exportDialog.description: Select the date and time to add to your calendar.
exportDialog.noSlots: No dates have been voted on yet.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Meeting
confirmDialog.description: Select the date and time to confirm. (Top 3)
confirmDialog.noSlots: No dates have been voted on yet.
confirmDialog.error: Failed to confirm meeting. Please try again.

kakaoShare.description: Pick the times that work for you.

viralCta.title: Want to create your own meeting?

dialog.title: You’re not signed in
dialog.description: Sign in to keep your vote, or continue anonymously.

anonymous.description: Enter a nickname and password to vote anonymously.

my.title: My Meetings
my.noMeetings: You haven't created any meetings yet.
my.noParticipatedMeetings: You haven't participated in any meetings yet.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.description: The page you requested does not exist or has been deleted.

meta.siteDescription: A service that makes it easy to schedule meetings with people. Create meetings, select multiple dates and time slots, and share them. When participants select their available times, we'll recommend the best date and time to meet.
meta.siteKeywords: schedule meeting, schedule coordination, group meeting, group schedule, time coordination, meeting management, schedule sharing, Time2Gather

home.title: Time2Gather - Schedule Meetings in 5 Seconds
home.description: Struggling to coordinate schedules with multiple people? Use Time2Gather to easily collect votes and find the best time for everyone.

create.title: Create Meeting - Time2Gather
create.description: Create a new meeting and share it with friends. Easily decide on dates, times, and locations through voting.

login.title: Login - Time2Gather
login.description: Log in easily with KakaoTalk and start scheduling. Get started quickly with social login.

my.title: My Meetings - Time2Gather
my.description: View all your created and participated meetings at a glance. Meeting management made easy.

meeting.title: {title} - Time2Gather
meeting.description: Join the {title} meeting. Select your available times and vote.

result.title: {title} Results - Time2Gather
result.description: Join {title} and choose the times that work for you.

chatBot.title: Schedule Assistant
chatBot.welcomeMessage: Hello! Ask me about your schedule.
chatBot.welcomeHint: e.g. "Show my meetings", "What's on next week?"
chatBot.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred. Please try again later.

locationVote.title: Location Vote
locationVote.selectionDescription: Choose all the locations that work for you.
locationVote.loadError: Could not load your location choices.
